side_effects.description: Extreme itching all over body, sneezing twice, dizziness, red palms — possible anaphylactic/allergic reaction occurring approximately 5 minutes after injection; subsided after 5-7 minutes
Felt pretty dizzy shortly after injection
Palms appeared to get really red

protocol_notes: OP had been taking Sermorelin for 2 months with no apparent issues before this acute allergic/anaphylactic-like reaction. Decided to stop taking it after this incident. Dose reported as '15 units' which is an ambiguous measurement as noted by a commenter — actual mcg dose unknown without knowing the reconstitution volume.
